name: shopify-blade-mcp
title: Shopify
description: Shopify Admin API operations via GraphQL — products, orders, customers, inventory, collections, fulfillment, discounts, metafields, webhooks, analytics
tagline: Full Shopify store management via GraphQL Admin API
author: groupthink-dev

setup.help_text: Create a custom app in Shopify Admin → Settings → Apps and sales channels → Develop apps → Create an app. Configure Admin API scopes, then install to get the access token.
prerequisites: Custom app with Admin API access scopes configured

highlights.text: Products — CRUD, variants, images, metafields, collections
Orders — list, search, fulfill, cancel, refund, edit
Customers — search, create, update, order history
Inventory — stock levels, adjustments, location management
Discounts — create and manage discount codes and automatic discounts
Analytics — sales reports, order summaries, product performance

readme:
### What it does

Shopify gives your AI agent full operational control over a Shopify store through the Admin GraphQL API. Products, orders, customers, inventory, collections, fulfillment, discounts, metafields, webhooks, and analytics — all manageable in conversation.

Your agent can list recent orders, check inventory levels, create a product variant, apply a discount code, fulfill an order, and pull sales analytics without touching the Shopify admin dashboard.

### GraphQL efficiency

All operations use Shopify’s Admin GraphQL API rather than REST. GraphQL lets each tool request exactly the fields needed, avoiding the over-fetching that plagues REST endpoints. A typical order lookup returns only the fields your agent needs — no wasted tokens on unused metadata.

Pagination is cursor-based and handled automatically. Bulk operations use GraphQL mutations with optimistic concurrency where appropriate.

### Safety model

The plugin follows Shopify’s scoped access model:

- **Reads** work with read-only scopes — list products, search orders, check inventory
- **Writes** require the corresponding write scopes on your custom app — create products, fulfill orders, adjust inventory
- **Destructive operations** use confirmation patterns to prevent accidental deletions

Scope your custom app’s API access to only what you need. The plugin respects whatever permissions the token carries.

### Domain coverage

| Domain | Capabilities |
|--------|--------------|
| Products | CRUD, variants, images, metafields, collections |
| Orders | List, search, fulfill, cancel, refund, edit |
| Customers | Search, create, update, order history |
| Inventory | Stock levels, adjustments, multi-location |
| Discounts | Codes, automatic discounts, price rules |
| Webhooks | Subscribe, list, manage event topics |
| Analytics | Sales, orders, product performance |

scenarios.label: Audit inventory levels across locations
scenarios.body: List all products with low stock, check inventory quantities across locations, and generate a reorder report for items below threshold.

scenarios.label: Process and fulfill recent orders
scenarios.body: List unfulfilled orders, verify inventory availability for each, create fulfillments with tracking numbers, and notify customers of shipment.

scenarios.label: Launch a new product with discount campaign
scenarios.body: Create a new product with variants and images, add it to a collection, then create a launch discount code and verify it applies correctly.
